description_long: This is a robust, rectangular wooden storage chest reinforced with thick, dark metal bands and corner plates. The chest features a domed, ribbed lid, also secured with metal strips and large, round rivets, giving it a medieval or treasure chest appearance. The wood panels are vertically aligned and have a natural, slightly textured grain, while the metalwork appears weathered and industrial. On the front, there is a prominent metal latch mechanism for securing the lid, but no visible handles or labeling. The overall construction suggests durability and security, suitable for storing valuable or heavy items. Its design is both functional and decorative, making it suitable for use in garages, workshops, or as a decorative piece in urban environments.
description: A sturdy wooden chest with a domed lid, reinforced by dark metal bands and a central latch, evoking a classic treasure chest style. The chest is robust and decorative, ideal for secure storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: End view showing the domed lid, metal bands, and large rivets, with no visible latch or handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the chest, vertical wood panels, and three metal bands running over the lid.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, similar to view 0, with domed lid and metal reinforcement, no latch or handles visible.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the central metal latch mechanism, three vertical metal bands, and reinforced corners.
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, workshop, decorative indoor space
